entry.subject: The Line
entry.event:
I have a theory.
I often get tired between 11:30 and 1:30. I feel that if I go to bed then I would be able to sleep then. But i just cant. So normally I dont go to sleep until after that, then I'm just not tired anymore. So trying to go to sleep anytime after that is a disaster. It just doesnt happen. So I dont get to sleep until about 5am... like this morning. I think i gotta try goin to sleep early. The thin line between tired and not tired...

entry.subject: Sunny AND warm
entry.event: Walking to uni this morning and its sunny and warm! Little windy, prob wont last for long but it really was warm. Better to go to a test you know nothing about... or not go at all? Infact - dont answer that! Its the weekend!

I dont think im very stereotypically masculine...
I feel that I have quite a few not-so-masculine qualities (not physical, obviously). Its kinda buggin me...
On a lighter note, I got really stoned last night and watched Black Books series 2 - I havent laughed so much in a long time!

I fell asleep last night at 8pm. Then I woke up at 11:30 and swore a lot. I had missed ER. I had fallen asleep and missed ER. I was too stoned to sit up, so i lay down, and fell asleep. Dammit.
My Lord of the Rings Obsession continues!

entry.subject: Lost
entry.event: I watched Lost In Translation today and admired Scarlet Johanson's rear.

Jimmy Eat World were pretty damn good!



Hair is the new hat, Brown is the new black blonde

entry.subject: For the best...
entry.event:
You may (or may not) know how fucked up my year has been. Well I have decided that Im going to take a year out next year. It has to be done. There is no way that I can allow this to happen again next year. There were just too many drastic changes. I cant cope. Once again this year I have no money. It just isnt/hasnt worked out. Maybe another time soon, when I learn how to live on my own and budget and not spend so much money etc etc.
Until then I really think I should call it a day for now. Its been a wonderful experience...

entry.subject: So beautiful...
entry.event: Had a great night with different company than usual. Was fun and will be done again for sure.

A part of me feels like a failure...
I was so pleased when I got in to university and now ive left. I couldnt even make it past first year.
This will either be the best decision I have made or the worst. I just dont know what I want to do (career-wise). It'll all pan out in the end im sure...

entry.subject: Slow Dance
entry.event:
Have you ever watched kids
On a merry-go-round?
Or listened to the rain
Slapping on the ground?
Ever followed a butterfly's erratic flight?
Or gazed at the sun into the fading night?
You better slow down.
Don't dance so fast.
Time is short.
The music won't last.
Do you run through each day
On the fly?
When you ask How are you?
Do you hear the reply?
When the day is done
Do you lie in your bed
With the next hundred chores
Running through your head?
You'd better slow down
Don't dance so fast.
Time is short.
The music won't last.
Ever told your child,
We'll do it tomorrow?
And in your haste,
Not see his sorrow?
Ever lost touch,
Let a good friendship die
Cause you never had time
To call and say,"hi"
You'd better slow down.
Don't dance so fast.
Time is short.
The music won't last.
When you run so fast to get somewhere
You miss half the fun of getting there.
When you worry and hurry through your day,
It is like an unopened gift....
Thrown away
Life is not a race,
Do take it slower
Hear the music before the song is over

Ive worked everyday since friday and each one 9-6pm (except sun, only 4hrs). Im quite tired but they've been good days - in as far as working can be good.
Two days off until Im workin again. Im gonna spend the next two days in bed, on computer and watching movies.
Im very happy at the min. No uni to worry about. Some may say I'm a cop-out - I say I wasnt happy then, Im happy now. I need some time to myself. To earn some money and enjoy myself. Need a break from studying.
The Internets going to get me into a lot of trouble someday...
Had friday all planned. On sunday there were just 3. Monday there were 8. Now its just 5... I want to drink lots on friday!
